heading: Assistant Secretary of Defense for Manpower and Reserve Affairs
label: 10201 Assistant Secretary of Defense for Manpower and Reserve Affairs
text: As provided in section 138(b)(2) of this title, the official in the Department of Defense with responsibility for overall supervision of reserve affairs of the Department of Defense is the Assistant Secretary of Defense for Manpower and Reserve Affairs.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was struck out and subsec. (b)(4) was redesignated subsec. (b)(2) by , , .Section 138(b)(2) of this titlePub. L. 115–91, div. A, title IX, § 907(b)131 Stat. 1514Dec. 12, 2017

Amendments2014— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “As provided in , the official in the Department of Defense with responsibility for overall supervision of reserve component affairs of the Department of Defense is the Assistant Secretary of Defense for Reserve Affairs.”Pub. L. 113–291section 138(b)(2) of this title1996—, (f)(4), which directed that this section be amended, eff. , to read “The official in the Department of Defense with responsibility for overall supervision of reserve component affairs of the Department of Defense is the official designated by the Secretary of Defense to have that responsibility.”, was repealed by .Pub. L. 104–106, § 903(a)Pub. L. 104–201Jan. 31, 1997
